prose:
**Furan frontier orbitals** — computed with chemkit `frontier-orbitals` using DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`; this was a single-point orbital calculation, not a geometry optimization. Density fitting was not enabled. SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported by the tool result. Engine integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true`.

Headline result: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV**.

Additional returned orbital energies: HOMO = -6.3597638 eV; LUMO = -0.1024036 eV. Total electronic energy = -230.11429 Hartree (-6261.7289 eV).

Reproducibility: chemkit command returned as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpt2cf2dcr/live.json`. The chemkit result did not expose a separate live `.out` log path in the returned JSON; the result JSON path embedded in the invocation is `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpt2cf2dcr/live.json`.
